title: TaxiZone
description: A TLC Taxi Zone — the ~263 pickup/drop-off zones that PULocationID and DOLocationID in the trip records refer to. Published by TLC as a lookup table (taxi_zone_lookup.csv) plus a shapefile on the Trip Record Data page, NOT as a queryable API. This schema makes each zone a first-class, joinable resource — the geography spine for TripRecord.

locationId.description: LocationID — the join key used by trip records.
